title: West Side Story
full_description: The heartbreaking story about an impossible love that blooms during a gang war in the streets of New York. In a city full of rivalry and prejudice, the Jets and the Sharks fight for power over their divided neighbourhood. In the midst of this violence, former Jets member Tony and the sister of the Sharks leader Maria meet each other and fall madly in love. Their forbidden love ignites the tension between the gangs, with tragic consequences. A gripping musical full of rousing music, breathtaking dance and a story that continues to touch.
ai_summary: The Dutch-language revival of Bernstein and Sondheim's Romeo and Juliet retelling, following Tony and Maria's doomed love across the gang war of 1950s New York — with a grand live orchestra and a national tour.
